svg.aria-label: Scene 08A — Compass lights up (WOW 3, sacred moment) — Disney-pro
svg.title: Scene 08A — La bussola si accende (WOW 3)
svg.desc: Disney-pro 5-phase narrative: (1) silence + hand anticipation breath (0-2s), (2) glass rim ignites inner orange (2-3s), (3) needle pulses with squash 3x (3-4s), (4) cardinal tick-marks emerge staggered N→E→S→W (4-6s), (5) steady radiance + 3 concentric pulse rings + rising magic particles (6-8s). Orange #FF6B1A ONLY internal to the compass glass — never on background. Static camera macro. No text glyphs anywhere.
